description: Landscape memorial tribute graphic in ICE's 'Wall of Honor' series. The background is a softly blurred dark scene with a U.S. flag at upper right and a cluster of deep red roses along the right and bottom edges. At upper left, bold white serif text reads 'Wall of Honor' beside a memorial ribbon emblem incorporating an 'ICE' badge with the DHS seal. At center right is a large photograph of a gold U.S. Customs badge (Department of the Treasury) inscribed 'AIR INTERDICTION OFFICER,' set against a blue mat. Beneath the title, white serif text reads: 'Air Interdiction Officer / John Edwin Hollingsworth' over a thin gold rule, then 'End of Watch' and the date 'Saturday, October 20, 1984.'
notable_text: Wall of Honor; Air Interdiction Officer John Edwin Hollingsworth; End of Watch; Saturday, October 20, 1984
